name: folioblocks
description: Create fast, responsive photo and video gallery with grid, masonry, justified, modular, and carousel layouts—ideal for photographers and creatives.
author: FolioBlocks

scripts.i18n:locale:es: node scripts/i18n/generate-po.mjs es_ES && msgfmt languages/folioblocks-es_ES.po -o languages/folioblocks-es_ES.mo && npm run i18n:json:es
scripts.i18n:locale:fr: node scripts/i18n/generate-po.mjs fr_FR && msgfmt languages/folioblocks-fr_FR.po -o languages/folioblocks-fr_FR.mo && npm run i18n:json:fr
scripts.i18n:locale:it: node scripts/i18n/generate-po.mjs it_IT && msgfmt languages/folioblocks-it_IT.po -o languages/folioblocks-it_IT.mo && npm run i18n:json:it
scripts.i18n:locale:sv: node scripts/i18n/generate-po.mjs sv_SE && msgfmt languages/folioblocks-sv_SE.po -o languages/folioblocks-sv_SE.mo && npm run i18n:json:sv
scripts.i18n:locales: node scripts/i18n/build-locales.mjs sv_SE it_IT es_ES fr_FR
scripts.i18n:refresh: npm run i18n:pot && npm run build && npm run i18n:locales
